title: Platanitos - Food & Adventure
description: A fresh new way to expand your adventures, builds and even your diet!
body:
![PLATANITOS BACKGROUND](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1159afb58edbd43e2d3deebcb15a033c8c081741.png)

🍌 **Platanitos** is a remake of the original mod created by TeddiGamer in 2016. 

In this new version you will be able to get new food, encounter many wild plants in new and exciting biomes and even fight against new hostile mobs!

**Now dieting will be more fun than ever!**

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/-SPbtmXnWFA" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

##

![ABOUT MOD](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1f6c4660dd0b08c7aed702d2122a236fe783e32e.png)

🍌 **Platanitos** brings to Minecraft new foods to be obtained through crops, tree drops or even villager trades.

Players will have to discover a vast world full of wild plants and new resources to exploit and use in their adventures in dangerous and exciting biomes.

![ASH FOREST](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f99e0e4761d8fe1826ccf4da36f5c39fe6847b6d.jpeg)

##

![THE CONTENT](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a12787b6590c1204a3651b5dada3f32f6112242d.png)

🍌 In **Platanitos Vintage** you can find:

- New foods, plants and crops.
- New structures and biomes.
- New blocks and storages.
- New weapons and tools.
- New enchantments.
- New materials.
- New mobs.

And much more!

![MANY ITEMS](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/48af8c161dcd44f72e152b6beb02a79a4233801c.jpeg)

##

![THE CREATOR](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/5e65bcf3bb0864158b8d962586a0e92f18d4e28e.png)

🍌 **TeddiGamer** is the creator of this crazy mod.

Being a video editor and also an image editor, he now also enters the vast world of mods.

**Follow me on my social networks!**
